title: zygophyllaceae
intro: The Zygophyllaceae rank is a family of plants, commonly known as the catclaw or milk bush family. This family is characterized by its unique combination of small, four-angled fruits and leaves that are often alternate and simple. The Zygophyllaceae family includes approximately 100 species of plants, which are primarily found in warm, dry regions around the world. These plants are often shrubs or small trees, and are known for their distinctive growth habits and adaptations to arid environments.
